query:
SELECT 
                    COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0)::INT as "total!",
                    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN amount > 0 THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0)::INT as "income!",
                    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN amount < 0 THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0)::INT as "expenses!"
                FROM expenses.payments
                WHERE user_id = $1
